'''ây-t-m-l''' ('''kayatmeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backorder|backorder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==

|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-m-l

| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backorder|backorder]] (auto-generated)

! Citation form
| ây-t-m-l
|-

| kayatmeloko
|}
